channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 31, 2026
item.description: Greetings. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the latest from The VENCAst. Today is Tuesday, March 31, 2026. On today's program, we will cover the latest developments in the Middle East, including Israel's new death penalty ...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 30, 2026
item.description: From expanded military operations in Southern Lebanon to continued Iranian attacks across the Gulf, global tensions remain high. In Europe, Germany faces healthcare reform and questions of digital sovereignty, while the Czech Republic debates a natio...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 29, 2026
item.description: A month-long conflict escalates as the Pentagon reportedly prepares for ground operations in Iran. Millions of Americans rally against President Trump. And a fourth suspect is arrested in the Pardubice terror attack.
